description: Mutation + transaction behaviour (DELETE/CHANGE NODE, nested BEGIN/ROLLBACK) on a throwaway rw worktree off forgeql-pub.frozen. node_ids are captured at runtime, never hard-coded.

steps.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name='parse_offset' LIMIT 1
BEGIN TRANSACTION 'txn'
DELETE NODE '${A}'
FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name='parse_offset' LIMIT 1
ROLLBACK
FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name='parse_offset' LIMIT 1
FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name='parse_offset' LIMIT 1
BEGIN TRANSACTION 'txn'
CHANGE NODE '${A}' WITH 'fn parse_offset_renamed() {}'
FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name='parse_offset' LIMIT 1
ROLLBACK
FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name='parse_offset' LIMIT 1
FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name='parse_offset' LIMIT 1
BEGIN TRANSACTION 'outer'
DELETE NODE '${A}'
FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name='parse_offset' LIMIT 1
FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name='offset_lines' LIMIT 1
BEGIN TRANSACTION 'inner'
DELETE NODE '${B}'
FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name='offset_lines' LIMIT 1
ROLLBACK
FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name='offset_lines' LIMIT 1
FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name='parse_offset' LIMIT 1
ROLLBACK
FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name='parse_offset' LIMIT 1
ROLLBACK
